name: award-calendar
summary: Cheapest award dates for a route across a date range. Calendar grid view.

name: compare-flights
summary: Unified flight comparison across ALL sources in parallel. Auto-applies transfer optimization.

name: compare-hotels
summary: Unified hotel comparison across portals, metasearch, and Airbnb. FHR/Edit stacking detection.

name: trip-calculator
summary: Cash vs points decision answered with math. Transfer ratios, taxes, opportunity cost.

name: trip-planner
summary: Full trip planning. Flights + hotels + points in one shot.

name: duffel
summary: Primary cash prices. Real GDS per-fare-class data.

name: google-flights
summary: Browser-automated Google Flights. All airlines including Southwest.

name: ignav
summary: Fast REST API cash prices. Market selection for arbitrage.

name: seats-aero
summary: Award availability across 27 mileage programs.

name: seatmaps
summary: Aircraft seat maps, cabin dimensions, seat recommendations.

name: southwest
summary: SW fare classes, points pricing, Companion Pass. Change flight price drop monitor.

name: amex-travel
summary: Amex MR portal for flights, hotels, IAP discounts, FHR/THC benefits. Requires Platinum.

name: bilt
summary: Bilt Rewards travel portal for hotels and flights. 1.25 cpp on Bilt Points. Home Away From Home properties give $300+ in benefits to Gold/Platinum members.

name: chase-travel
summary: Chase UR portal for flights, hotels, Points Boost, Edit benefits. Requires Sapphire.

name: premium-hotels
summary: Search 4,659 Amex FHR/THC + Chase Edit hotels by city. Stacking opportunities.

name: rapidapi
summary: Booking.com hotel prices.

name: serpapi
summary: Google Hotels search and destination discovery.

name: ticketsatwork
summary: TicketsAtWork (EBG) corporate-perks portal. Hotels, theme park tickets, attractions, live events. Often beats portals by 10-30%.

name: american-airlines
summary: AAdvantage balance and elite status. AwardWallet does not support AA.

name: awardwallet
summary: All loyalty balances, elite status, history.

name: transfer-partners
summary: Cheapest transfer path from credit card points to mileage programs.

name: wheretocredit
summary: Mileage earning rates by airline and booking class across 50+ programs.

name: atlas-obscura
summary: Hidden gems and unusual attractions near any destination.

name: scandinavia-transit
summary: Trains, buses, ferries in Norway, Sweden, and Denmark. Includes Danish fare/zone pricing.

name: tripadvisor
summary: Hotel ratings, restaurant search, attraction reviews, nearby search. 5K calls/month.

name: flight-search-strategy
summary: The canonical multi-source search workflow. Source priority (Duffel > Ignav > Google Flights > others), market selection for international routes, source accuracy hierarchy, common failure modes.

name: transfer-bonuses
summary: Active credit card transfer bonuses with primary-source citations. Tells the agent the real effective ratio when transferring points during a promotion.

name: stopovers
summary: Per-program stopover rules for award redemptions. Includes Icelandair free stopover, Aeroplan, Alaska Atmos, Flying Blue, Singapore tiers, plus the negative space (BA, AA, Delta, JetBlue) that have no stopover programs.

name: award-holds
summary: Per-program rules for placing award flight tickets on hold. Covers 6 programs with reliable holds (AA 24h online, LH 5 days, FB 3 days, CX 2 days, Turkish 2 days, Virgin Atlantic 1-2 days), Singapore as agent-discretionary, and the negative space (UA/AS/DL/Aeroplan/BA/etc. — most programs do not allow holds).

name: points-valuations
summary: CPP formula, floor/ceiling rules, surcharge-heavy programs to avoid, transfer bonus considerations, Chase Points Boost dynamics, opportunity cost.

name: partner-awards
summary: Which programs ticket which airlines (alliance + bilateral). Cross-references credit card currencies to booking programs. Reachability workflow.

name: alliances
summary: Star Alliance, oneworld, SkyTeam membership and recent shifts (SAS to SkyTeam, ITA to Star, Hawaiian/Fiji to oneworld). Key cross-alliance booking relationships.

name: award-sweet-spots
summary: Catalog of legendary, excellent, and good award redemptions with current rates and devaluation history.

name: cabin-codes
summary: IATA cabin codes (F/J/W/Y) and saver fare class codes (X/I/O) for partner-bookable inventory.

name: hotel-chains
summary: Maps brand names (Westin, Holiday Inn, etc.) to chain families and loyalty programs.

name: fallback-and-resilience
summary: What to do when each tool fails. Tool-by-tool fallback paths.

name: booking-guidance
summary: The booking flow, hold-before-transfer rule, phone numbers for major programs.

name: lessons-learned
summary: Hard-won knowledge from real searches. The mandatory Seats.aero workflow, Southwest specifics, Companion Pass math, source accuracy, small-market caveats, Duffel limitations. Load before any award flight search.

name: round-the-world
summary: RTW + Pacific Circle + Asia-Pacific Circle + regional distance-award reference. 13 active programs, 4 discontinued.

name: status-match
summary: Per-program status match rules with lifetime / once-per-N-years warnings, free vs paid concierge distinction, real fees, plus card-granted renewable status as the alternative.
